title: hicorius × dunbarii
intro: Hicorius × dunbarii is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Hicoria ovata and Hicoria alba, and is also known as the Dunbar's hickory or swamp hickory. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hicorius × dunbarii include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various methods of consumption to harness its medicinal properties.
